action.name: Open Terminal Here
action.description: Open kitty in the selected folder

action.name: Open Terminal at File Location
action.description: Open kitty in the folder containing the selected file

action.name: Open in Ranger
action.description: Browse the folder in ranger (terminal)

action.name: Open Folder as Root
action.description: Open Thunar as administrator in this folder

action.name: Open Folder in VSCodium
action.description: Add folder to VSCodium workspace

action.name: Open with VSCodium
action.description: Open file in VSCodium

action.name: Edit with Zed
action.description: Open file in Zed editor

action.name: Edit with Mousepad
action.description: Open file in Mousepad text editor

action.name: Edit with Neovim
action.description: Edit file in Neovim (terminal)

action.name: Copy Path
action.description: Copy full path to clipboard

action.name: Copy Filename
action.description: Copy filename (without path) to clipboard

action.name: Copy as file:// URL
action.description: Copy file URI for pasting into browsers or apps

action.name: Move to Trash
action.description: Move selected item to trash (safer than permanent delete)

action.name: Duplicate
action.description: Create a copy next to the original

action.name: Create Symlink Here
action.description: Create a symbolic link in the current folder

action.name: Make Executable
action.description: Allow this file to run as a script or program

action.name: Run Script
action.description: Run script in a terminal window

action.name: Set as Wallpaper
action.description: Set image as desktop wallpaper (awww)

action.name: Open with Image Viewer
action.description: View image in Eye of GNOME

action.name: Compare in Meld
action.description: Compare two or more selected files

action.name: Show Folder Size
action.description: Display total size of the selected folder

action.name: SHA256 Checksum
action.description: Show SHA256 hash of the selected file

action.name: Git Status Here
action.command: kitty --directory="%f" --hold -e sh -c 'git status || echo "Not a git repository."; read'
action.description: Show git status in a terminal

action.name: Git Log (last 20)
action.command: kitty --directory="%f" --hold -e sh -c 'git log --oneline -20 || echo "Not a git repository."; read'
action.description: Show recent git commits in a terminal
